hero.title: Surge
hero.subtitle: Production-ready infrastructure. Deployed in days. Owned by you from day one.
terminalSequence: > [SUCCESS] Keys handed over. Root access granted.

problem.title: Your Cloud Bill Is a Subscription You Forgot to Cancel
problem.body: Except you can't cancel it, and it keeps growing. Every month, you're paying for compute you don't fully control, data paths you can't fully trace, and vendor relationships you can't fully exit. Security decisions made now compound. So do infrastructure costs.
problem.corePrinciple: We don't touch your code. You hold the keys. We deploy the capability — and then we leave.

stacks.title: Sovereign Base
stacks.subtitle: The foundation. Everything starts here.
stacks.body: Hardened bare-metal or cloud VPS base. Default-deny UFW/iptables, Fail2Ban, SSH key-only access, secure WireGuard/Tailscale VPN tunnel for admin access. Docker/Podman ready. This is the foundation every other stack builds on — and it's solid enough to stand alone.
deliverables: Hardened OS configuration (default-deny firewall, Fail2Ban, SSH hardening)
WireGuard/Tailscale VPN tunnel for secure admin access

stacks.title: Observability Engine
stacks.subtitle: See everything. Miss nothing.
stacks.body: Comprehensive logging, metrics, and tracing. Grafana dashboards, Prometheus metrics, Loki/ELK log aggregation. Automated alerting hooks to Slack and Teams. You see what's happening across your infrastructure — in real time.
deliverables: Custom alert rules for your stack

stacks.title: Zero-Trust Identity Stack
stacks.subtitle: Identity is the new perimeter.
stacks.body: Keycloak or Authelia SSO integration. Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) foundation. Enforced MFA for internal applications. Identity is the new perimeter — and this stack locks it down.

stacks.title: Compliance Bastion
stacks.subtitle: SOC 2/ISO 27001 ready infrastructure.
stacks.body: Foundational infrastructure explicitly mapped to SOC 2 and ISO 27001 controls. Automated evidence collection, immutable audit logging, encrypted volumes, disaster recovery backups. Compliance-ready from the first deployment.

stacks.title: Aurorys Core
stacks.subtitle: Our exact internal stack. Months of R&D, deployed in days.
stacks.body: Security + Networking + Observability + Internal Business Tools. Fully integrated. This is the stack we run on — the same hardened configurations, monitoring, and tooling that powers our own infrastructure. We eat our own cooking, and now you can too.
deliverables: Internal business tooling (project management, communication, documentation)

deliveryProcess.title: How Surge Gets Deployed
deliveryProcess.subtitle: Four steps. You provision. We deploy. We snapshot. You own.

steps.title: You Provision
steps.body: You spin up the bare-metal or cloud VPS. You hold the keys from the start — we never have root access to your production environment after deployment. You choose the provider, the region, and the specs.

steps.title: We Deploy
steps.body: We run our pre-built IaC to build the architecture on your hardware. This isn't consulting hours — it's months of R&D compressed into a deployment. The same configurations we've tested, hardened, and run internally.

steps.title: Day-0 Golden Snapshot
steps.body: Once deployed, we create an immutable Day-0 snapshot of the perfect, working architecture. This is your golden backup — the pristine state you can always revert to if something goes wrong. Break the routing rules three months from now? Revert to Day-0. You hold the keys to your own safety net.

steps.title: Handoff & Training
steps.body: We conduct a deep-dive knowledge transfer session. Specifically, we train your team on:
trainingItems: The 3-2-1 backup rule and how to maintain it
How to revert to the Day-0 Golden State if anything breaks
How the architecture is structured and why each decision was made
How to extend and modify the stack on your own
steps.closingNote: Then we leave. You own everything. No managed services. No support retainers. No lock-in. Including ours.

liabilityBoundary.title: No MSSP Lock-In. No Support Retainers.
liabilityBoundary.body: We do not act as your outsourced IT, and we do not offer support retainers. We deploy the capability, provide the Day-0 Golden Backup, and train you to own it. If you break the routing rules three months from now, you hold the keys to revert to the Day-0 snapshot. We treat you like engineering adults.
liabilityBoundary.opinionatedNote: Our stacks are highly opinionated. They are built on the open-source tools we trust and use ourselves. If you want to customize the stack or add your own tools — you have root access, go for it. If you need us to integrate custom hybrid setups, we can scope that as a separate engagement.

surgeVsFull.title: When Surge vs. When a Full Engagement

rows.label: What you get
rows.surge: Pre-built infrastructure stack deployed to your hardware
rows.full: Custom architecture designed for your specific stack

rows.label: Best for
rows.full: You need a security architecture designed for your specific environment

rows.label: Ownership
rows.full: You own everything from day one

surgeVsFull.closingNote: Not sure which you need? If you need infrastructure deployed fast and you're comfortable with opinionated defaults, Surge is the right call. If you need a custom security architecture designed for your specific environment, start with Foundation.

complianceCrossLink.title: Surge + Clearance: Compliance-Ready Infrastructure
complianceCrossLink.body: Need infrastructure that's ready for your SOC 2 audit? The Compliance Bastion (coming soon) combines a hardened Surge deployment with our Clearance compliance readiness engagement. Infrastructure that's audit-ready from day one — not after months of retrofitting.

crossLinks.title: Ready to take the next step?
